# Support

## Getting help

Start with:

1. [README.md](../README.md)
2. [docs/milestone-1-scope-inventory.md](../docs/milestone-1-scope-inventory.md)
3. existing issues and discussions, if available

## Where to open issues

- use bug reports for reproducible behavior problems
- use feature requests for focused improvements
- use discussions or Q&A threads for usage questions when available

## Before opening an issue

- include the affected paths or scope type
- include the exact commands you ran
- include sample output if the problem involves discovery results
- note whether you are using full Xcode or only Apple Command Line Tools
